title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent with a modular architecture centered around core read, write, edit, and bash capabilities, with user-installable extensions. It supports multiple models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, addressing rate limit constraints of frontier models.
